title: behavioral-ddos-sensitivity-override
description: Hostnames and path, overriding the global sensitivity setting.

host.description: Hostname in host and path pair to override.  Wildcards are allowed (`*` and `?`).

path.description: Path in host and path pair to override.  Wildcards are allowed (`*` and `?`).

sensitivity.description: Sensitivity level, specify `CONSERVATIVE` to provide tolerance for more substantial traffic deviations, `MODERATE` to provide tolerance for traffic fluctuations, or `STRICT` or high-security environments, where minor deviations in traffic might signal a potential DDoS attack.
